title: Japan’s Top-Three Convenience Store Chain Lawson to Launch Country’s First POS-Integrated Stablecoin Payment Trial
content:
Japan’s Top-Three Convenience Store Chain Lawson to Launch Country’s First POS-Integrated Stablecoin Payment Trial
Japan’s top-three convenience store chain Lawson will trial yen-denominated stablecoin JPYC payments in early August at its Takanawa Gateway City store in Tokyo, in partnership with HashPort. Customers will pay via mobile wallet barcodes. Lawson said it will be Japan’s first stablecoin payment trial integrated with a POS system. —

title: American Bitcoin, Co-Founded by Eric Trump, Plunges More Than 95% From Peak
content:
American Bitcoin, Co-Founded by Eric Trump, Plunges More Than 95% From Peak
Bloomberg reported that American Bitcoin shares have fallen over 95% from their peak, wiping more than $600 million from the value of Eric Trump’s roughly 6% stake over the past 10 months. The company conducted a 1-for-15 reverse stock split to maintain its Nasdaq listing and hit a record low on Wednesday. It continues to mine and accumulate Bitcoin, adding 500 BTC on Monday to bring holdings above 8,000 BTC. In Q1, it posted a $118.2 million operating loss after a $117.2 million Bitcoin impairment. —

title: Japan PM Sanae Takaichi Reaffirms Startup and Web3 Support at WebX 2026
content:
Japan PM Sanae Takaichi Reaffirms Startup and Web3 Support at WebX 2026
Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said in a video address at WebX 2026 that the government will strengthen startup support through measures including increased funding from government-backed funds and financial institutions and regulatory easing. She said the government’s initiatives and WebX could jointly support the development of Japan’s Web3 innovation ecosystem. —

title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $197 Million in Weekly Net Inflows, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streak
content:
Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $197 Million in Weekly Net Inflows, Ending Eight-Week Outflow Streak
From July 6 to 10 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $197 million in net inflows, ending an eight-week outflow streak. Spot Ethereum ETFs saw $84.42 million in net inflows, also ending eight consecutive weeks of outflows. Spot SOL ETFs drew $930,400, HYPE ETFs $10.36 million, while XRP ETFs posted $7.18 million in net outflows. —

title: [이더 옵션 데일리] 미결제약정 42억6872만 달러…1900달러 콜옵션 거래량 집중
content: 이더리움 옵션 시장에서는 미결제약정 규모가 증가세를 보이는 가운데 24시간 거래량은 데리비트의 1900달러 콜옵션 계약에 가장 집중됐다.13일 오전 9시 50분 코인글래스 집계에 따르면 이더리움 옵션 미결제약정(OI)은 총 42억6872만 달러로 집계됐다. 전일(41억6427만 달러) 대비 2.51% 증가했다. 이더리움 옵션 거래량은 약 6억6562만 달러로 집계됐다.미결제약정 구성은 콜옵션 58.48%, 풋옵션 41.52%로 나타났다. 24시간 거래량 기준으로는 콜옵션 50.22%, 풋옵션 49.78%로 집계됐다.OI에서는 콜옵션이 뚜렷하게 우위를 보이며 중기 포지션이 상승 방향에 더 많이 배치된 모습이다. 거래량도 콜옵션이 소폭 앞섰지만 격차가 작아 단기...  더보기
reason: 이더리움 옵션 시장에 대한 정보가 제공되며, 거래량과 미결제약정에 대한 분석이 포함되어 있어 시청자에게 흥미로운 내용을 제공할 수 있다.

title: [비트 옵션 데일리] 미결제약정 273억2092만 달러…6만3000달러 풋옵션 거래 집중

title: [선물 고수 PICK] XRP 달러마진 포지션 1.33%p 소폭 축소...비트코인 계좌 1.40%p 증가

Tom Lee: Why Ethereum Could Become a $5 Trillion Network
On July 7, 2026, Tom Lee stated in an interview with the New Era Finance Podcast that at its current valuation of around $300 billion, Ethereum is grossly undervalued. As traditional assets like stocks and real estate gradually become composable, monetized, and digitized, running on Ethereum and other blockchains, he believes Ethereum could easily become a $1 trillion to $5 trillion network in the next few years.
Regarding how Ethereum captures value, Tom Lee compared it to land; if everything happens on Ethereum, then Ethereum is equivalent to the land of the digital world, making it the core asset that should appreciate over time. —

title: Stablecoin Market Loses $10B Since May in Biggest Retreat Since the Terra Crash
content:
Stablecoin Market Loses $10B Since May in Biggest Retreat Since the Terra Crash
According to CoinDesk, stablecoin market capitalization has fallen by roughly $10 billion from its May peak, including a $7.7 billion drop in June—the largest monthly decline in dollar terms since May 2022. The pullback was led by USDT, which fell from about $190 billion to $184 billion, and USDC, which declined to roughly $73 billion. Despite the headline drop, the overall contraction was only about 3%. —

title: BlackRock’s BUIDL Tops $900M on Avalanche, Doubles in a Week
content:
BlackRock’s BUIDL Tops $900M on Avalanche, Doubles in a Week
According to RWA xyz, BlackRock’s tokenized money market fund BUIDL has surpassed $900 million in assets under management (AUM) on the Avalanche network, increasing by approximately $436 million (105%) over the past week. Launched in March 2024, BUIDL now has a total AUM of about $2.87 billion, making it one of the world’s largest on-chain tokenized U.S. Treasury funds. —

title: Thailand’s Central Bank and SEC Probe High-Value USDT Transactions
content:
Thailand’s Central Bank and SEC Probe High-Value USDT Transactions
According to The Nation, the Bank of Thailand will require individuals depositing THB 5 million ($150,000) or more in cash to verify the source of funds. It is also working with Thailand’s SEC to review large stablecoin transactions, particularly USDT, over concerns about concealed ownership and attempts to bypass domestic remittance channels. —

title: Adam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoin
content:
Adam Back and Michael Saylor Oppose BIP 110 on Bitcoin
Blockstream co-founder and Hashcash inventor Adam Back and Strategy founder Michael Saylor both opposed implementing BIP 110 on the Bitcoin network. Back said BIP 110 attempts to police other people’s transactions and conflicts with Bitcoin’s principles of decentralization and permissionlessness, warning that pushing it forward would only lead to a fork. Saylor said BIP 110 turns a spam dispute into a consensus change that would invalidate some currently valid, fee-paying transactions. He argued that such a precedent is highly dangerous and that the community should focus on more fundamental threats. —

title: Ripple CEO Says Company Considered Shutting Down After 2020 SEC Lawsuit
content:
Ripple CEO Says Company Considered Shutting Down After 2020 SEC Lawsuit
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said the company seriously considered shutting down after the U.S. SEC sued it in 2020. He said Ripple could have distributed its XRP holdings to shareholders and told the SEC it no longer held XRP, but chose to keep fighting the lawsuit to avoid hundreds of job losses. —

title: Top 5 South Korean Exchanges' Volume Falls for Five Straight Weeks, Below KRW 10 Trillion
content:
Top 5 South Korean Exchanges' Volume Falls for Five Straight Weeks, Below KRW 10 Trillion
According to Digital Asset, the weekly trading volume of South Korea’s top five fiat-market crypto exchanges (Upbit, Bithumb, Coinone, Korbit, and Gopax) has fallen for five consecutive weeks, dropping below the 10 trillion KRW mark. Data shows that the total trading volume for the week of July 3–10 was ~9.9676 trillion KRW, a 25.75% decrease from the previous week (approx. 13.4 trillion KRW) and a 43.5% decline from early June (17.7 trillion KRW). This marks the first time the weekly trading volume has fallen below 10 trillion KRW in about 2 years and 9 months, since late September 2023. —

title: Just In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit
content:
Just In: Hedera’s largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit
Hedera-based lending protocol Bonzo Lend disclosed that it lost approximately $9.05 million in an oracle exploit. Bonzo said a flaw in Supra’s signature verification allowed an attacker to manipulate SAUCE prices and borrow assets far exceeding posted collateral. The protocol has since been paused. Bonzo Labs and the Bonzo Finance Foundation coordinate on recovery and remediation efforts. —

title: Highlight Clip Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs
content:
Highlight Clip Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs
Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin’s Two Ticking Time Bombs
A former Meta engineer says Bitcoin faces two ticking time bombs that have yet to be defused: quantum computing and the future of miner incentives. Quantum advances could one day threaten Bitcoin wallet security, while the lack of a sustainable fee market raises questions about long-term network security as mining rewards decline.
He also challenges Bitcoin’s vision as a sovereign currency, arguing that governments are unlikely to tolerate a monetary system beyond their control. —

title: Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M
content:
Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M
Sky Frontier Foundation said in its June 2026 financial and operational update that Sky Protocol's annualized gross revenue run rate reached a record $419.08 million, based on the last three Monthly Settlement Cycles. Cumulative yield accrued to sUSDS holders through the Sky Savings Rate has surpassed $250 million since inception, while Sky Reserves closed June at $82.5 million, up $33.7 million since March. Grove, one of Sky's Prime Agents, launched its GROVE governance token in June. Separately, a fixed-yield product for sUSDS introduced through Sky.Money and Pendle Finance reached $44.1 million in TVL during its first month. —

content:
모멘텀(MMT)이 높은 투자심리를 배경으로 시장의 주목을 받고 있다. 모멘텀은 이날 원화마켓에서 286원에 거래되며 전일 대비 5.61%(-17원) 하락했다.

장중 고가는 306원, 저가는 277원으로 집계되었으며, 24시간 기준 거래대금은 약 182억 원(18,259,429,283 KRW)을 기록했다. 차트상 모멘텀은 장 초반 300원대를 회복하며 강한 흐름을 보였지만, 이후 차익실현 매물이 출회되면서 종가 기준 음봉으로 마감한 모습이다. 다만 일일 거래량은 2,333만 개 수준으로 크게 증가했고, 최근 3일 평균 대비 500% 이상 거래량이 급증했다는 경고 문구도 포착돼 단기 수급 쏠림이 강하게 나타난 것으로 해석된다.

content: 퍼미션리스(공개형) 블록체인은 중앙 중개자에 대한 의존을 줄이겠다는 약속에서 출발했다. 그러나 국제결제은행(BIS)이 7월 6일 발표한 불리틴 126호는 정반대의 현실을 지적한다. 비트코인과 이더리움 이후 분산원장(DLT) 위의 활동은 결제·디파이·디지털자산 시장으로 빠르게 확장됐지만, 확장 가능한 단일 인프라로 수렴하는 대신 수많은 네트워크로 쪼개져 유동성을 분산시키고 네트워크 효과를 희석시켰다는 것이다. 보고서는 이 분열이 기술적 우연이 아니라 합의 메커니즘에 내재한 경제적 트레이드오프의 결과라고 진단했다. 합의는 토큰 인센티브 균형이다 블록체인은 서로 알지도 신뢰하지도 않는...  더보기
reason: 블록체인, 분산원장, 비트코인, 이더리움, 분산성, 네트워크 효과 등 암호화폐와 직접 관련된 키워드가 다수 등장한다.

title: [토큰분석] 효율의 이면, 토큰화가 만든 다섯 갈래 리스크
content: 토큰화는 일부 마찰을 줄이는 동시에 새로운 위험을 만든다. IMF 보고서는 효율 서사에 가려지기 쉬운 리스크 지형을 라이프사이클 단계별로 정리한다. 그리고 이 위험들은 대체로 아키텍처 선택에 따라 크기가 달라진다. 브리지·오케스트레이터·오라클이 개입할수록 취약점이 늘어난다. ① 스마트컨트랙트라는 공격 벡터 토큰의 안전성은 블록체인 프로토콜만으로 보장되지 않는다. 토큰 컨트랙트에 삽입된 커스텀 함수블랙리스트, 자동 이자 지급, 투표 기능 등는 유연성을 주지만, 악의적 발행자가 잔액을 조작하거나 배분을 변경할 여지도 만든다. 보고서는 발행(minting) 권한을 멀티시그(예: 2-of-3, 4-of-7)와 타임락, 발행...  더보기
reason: 토큰화와 스마트 컨트랙트의 안전성, 위험성에 대한 분석이 담겨 있어 암호화폐 전문 방송 채널의 시청자에게 중요하고 흥미로운 내용입니다.

title: [토큰분석] 토큰화 세계의 세 갈래 길… 단일·공통·호환 원장이 가르는 ‘원자적 결제’의 운명
content: 토큰화의 효율은 기술만으로 결정되지 않는다. IMF 보고서는 원장(ledger)·자산·소유자 사이의 관계, 즉 아키텍처가 거래의 효율과 리스크를 좌우한다고 강조한다. 자산이 같은 원장에 기록되는지, 그리고 소유자가 그 원장에 접근할 수 있는지  이 두 축의 조합에서 세 가지 모델이 도출된다. 단일 원장  강한 원자성, 그러나 아직 존재하지 않는 이상 단일 원장(single ledger) 모델은 거래되는 모든 자산이 하나의 원장에 기록되고 모든 소유자가 여기에 접근한다. 이 구조에서만 엄격한 원자성(strict atomicity)과 완전한 컴포저빌리티가 성립하며, 사전예치(prefunding) 없이 원자적 DvP·DvD·PvP가 가능하다....  더보기
reason: 토큰화와 원장(ledger)에 대한 설명이 있어 암호화폐 기술과 관련이 있다.

title: [토큰분석] IMF “토큰화는 금융 인프라를 없애지 않는다… ‘하이브리드 FMI’로 재편할 뿐”
content: 토큰화된 세계에서 증권예탁기관(CSD)과 중앙청산소(CCP)는 사라질 것인가. 국제통화기금(IMF)이 발표한 워킹페이퍼 「토큰화 경제의 금융시장인프라 진화」은 이 질문에 아니다라고 답한다. 스마트컨트랙트와 분산원장이 오늘날 CSD·증권결제시스템(SSS)·CCP·거래정보저장소(TR)가 수행하는 상당수 기능을 대체할 수 있지만, 코드 그 자체는 법적 확실성을 제공하지도, 책임을 지지도, 위기 상황에서 재량을 행사하지도 못한다는 것이다. 보고서의 핵심 명제는 한 문장으로 압축된다. 토큰화는 탈중개화(disintermediation)가 아니라 제도의 재설계(institutional redesign)를 의미한다. 가장 개연성 높은 결과는...  더보기
reason: IMF가 발표한 워킹페이퍼는 토큰화와 금융 인프라의 관계에 대한 분석을 담고 있어 크립토와 관련이 있다.

title: 이더리움 핵심 통신층서 치명적 결함…단일 메시지로 노드 마비

title: 암호화폐 결제카드 누적 106억 달러 돌파… 월 충전액 10개월 만에 두 배로

title: Cambridge Report: Ethereum’s Annual Power Use Falls to 7.87 GWh After The Merge
content:
Cambridge Report: Ethereum’s Annual Power Use Falls to 7.87 GWh After The Merge
According to a new report from the Cambridge Centre for Alternative Finance (CCAF), Ethereum consumes approximately 7.87 GWh of electricity annually following The Merge, a decline of more than 99.9% from its pre-Merge level. The report estimates annual emissions at around 2.37 ktCO₂e, down roughly 99.98%, based on an infrastructure audit of approximately 8,522 nodes. It also finds that the United States, Germany, Finland, and France host about 62% of Ethereum full nodes, while Hetzner, Amazon Web Services, and OVH together host roughly 40% of all nodes. In addition, 56.4% of the network’s electricity is supplied by sustainable energy sources, with the report concluding that Ethereum’s environmental footprint is now driven primarily by the carbon intensity of local power grids rather than its consensus mechanism. —

꼬리 사건이 모든 것을 결정한다.-모건 하우절-하우절은 투자 수익의 대부분이 소수의 극단적 사건(꼬리 사건)에서 나온다고 분석한다. 넷플릭스, 아마존, 비트코인의 초기 투자자들이 전체 포트폴리오의 수익 대부분을 이 소수의 종목에서 얻었듯이, 평범한 99일보다 극단적인 1일이 성과를 결정한다. 이것의 실전적 함의는 두 가지다. 첫째, 극단적 상승에 참여하려면 시장에 남아있어야 한다. 둘째, 극단적 하락에서 살아남으려면...  더보기

title: South Korea's largest automaker completes pilot USDT stablecoin transfer on Avalanche
content:
South Korea's largest automaker completes pilot USDT stablecoin transfer on Avalanche
Hyundai Motor, South Korea's largest automaker, became the country’s first major company to use blockchain for real-time internal cross-border treasury transfers. The company completed a $20,000 USDT stablecoin pilot from its U.S. entity to its Mexico entity on Avalanche, cutting settlement time from several hours through traditional banking rails to about seven minutes. Hyundai plans to expand the mechanism to more countries and local currencies, and will launch a second pilot for its European subsidiaries later this month with Circle and Visa. — 
link

content:
Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Sold 1,400 BTC for $87.1M to Repay Debt, Fund Property Acquisition and Legal Expenses
Nasdaq-listed Empery Digital disclosed in an SEC filing that it sold 1,400 BTC since May at an average price of $62,200, generating approximately $87.1 million in proceeds. The funds will be used to repay debt, support a previously announced property acquisition and cover legal expenses.
The company has recently shifted its strategic focus toward AI infrastructure, including participation in a proposed $1 billion AI data center project alongside members of the Hunt and Crow families. Empery also announced it would discontinue public NAV disclosures based solely on bitcoin holdings, citing growing exposure to AI and energy infrastructure businesses. —
